features.name: implicitly static loop variable in for loop declaration
features.description: Code should include a for loop with the loop variable declared in the initialization section, making it implicitly static
features.snippet: for (int i=0; i<2; i++) if (trace_rv_i_valid_ip[t][i]==1) begin bit i0; i0 = i != 0 || trace_rv_i_valid_ip[t]!=3; end
